commands.name: yarn
examples: yarn --version # 查看 yarn 版本
yarn config current # 查看当前配置
yarn help # 查看帮助信息

commands.name: yarn install
examples: yarn install # 安装依赖
yarn install --immutable # 严格按锁文件安装
yarn install --mode=skip-build # 跳过 postinstall 构建

commands.name: yarn add
examples: yarn add axios # 添加运行时依赖
yarn add -D vite # 添加开发依赖
yarn add react@latest # 安装指定版本

commands.name: yarn remove
examples: yarn remove axios # 移除依赖
yarn remove eslint prettier # 批量移除依赖
yarn remove react-dom # 删除指定包

commands.name: yarn dev
examples: yarn dev # 启动开发环境
yarn dev --host # 对外开放访问
yarn dev --port 3001 # 指定端口

commands.name: yarn build
examples: yarn build # 执行构建
yarn build:prod # 运行生产构建脚本
yarn workspaces foreach -pt run build # 工作区批量构建

commands.name: yarn test
examples: yarn test # 执行测试
yarn test --watch # 监听模式
yarn test --coverage # 生成覆盖率报告

commands.name: yarn dlx
commands.description: 临时执行 npm 包中的 CLI
examples: yarn dlx create-next-app@latest demo # 运行脚手架
yarn dlx eslint . # 临时执行 eslint
yarn dlx serve dist # 临时启动静态服务

commands.name: yarn workspaces
examples: yarn workspaces list # 查看所有工作区
yarn workspaces foreach -pt run lint # 批量执行脚本
yarn workspace web dev # 在指定工作区执行脚本
